name: RBL Bank Cookies Credit Card
exclusions: card uses monthly fee model rather than conventional annual fee
5x rewards apply on eligible online spend only
milestoneBenefits: Monthly card fee can be waived on meeting eligible monthly spend threshold as per RBL terms
additionalBenefits: 1 reward point per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
Useful for entry-level online spenders who can hit monthly waiver threshold

salaried: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to RBL Bank approval criteria
